title: Animol
overview: Behind the walls of a young offender institution, Troy is thrust into a brutal world of gangs, loyalty and violence from the moment he arrives. When an unspoken bond develops with a fellow inmate, it becomes a dangerous vulnerability for them.

title: The Weight
overview: In 1933 Oregon, Samuel Murphy is torn from his daughter and sent to a brutal work camp. Warden Clancy tempts him with early release if he smuggles gold through deadly wilderness, but betrayal festers within the crew, and Murphy questions how far he’ll go to see his child again.

title: Forgotten Island
overview: Jo and Raissa find themselves stranded on the fantastic world of the forgotten island of Nakali. They find that their only way home might come at the expense of a lifetime of memories and emotions.

title: Verity
overview: Struggling writer Lowen Ashleigh is on the brink of financial ruin when she accepts the job offer of a lifetime: she's been hired to complete the remaining books in a successful series that bestselling thriller author Verity Crawford is unable to finish after a mysterious accident. Upon arrival at the lavish Crawford estate, Ashleigh slowly learns that things are not exactly as they seem.

title: Digger
overview: The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity's saviour before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.

title: Любопытная Варвара. Тайны востока
overview: Varya, a girl who knows everything about forensics and dreams of becoming a great detective like her grandfather, and her best friend Vasya, who is ready to do anything for adventure, will once again prove that childhood curiosity and faith in goodness are stronger than any difficulty.

title: The Ascent
overview: Wedding guests at a European resort face terror when their celebration turns into a life-or-death struggle high above dangerous waters teeming with sharks.

title: Nightmares
overview: The true story that became the basis one of the greatest horror movies of all time, following a journalist attempting to uncover the truth behind several unexplained deaths

title: Corpus Delicti
overview: In the near future, the “method” controls the health and freedom of society. The life of neuroscientist Mia Holl, who is loyal to the system, changes abruptly when her brother Moritz Holl is wrongly accused of murder and imprisoned. In the fight for truth and justice, Mia begins to question the system and becomes the hunted herself.

title: Pianke
overview: The story of a young German boy and his father who befriend a Jewish family during WWII.

title: Artificial
overview: An undercover cop is assigned to monitor a humanoid robot, but an unexpected bond over art leads to a final task: creating a painting.

title: If You Can Make It Here
overview: Kingsley, Kevin, and Hailey are three ambitious eighth graders preparing for a single exam that could determine their futures. They’re competing for admission to New York City’s Specialized High Schools, elite public institutions that have produced Nobel Prize laureates, astronauts, judges, artists, and national leaders. But as the kids await their test results, a citywide battle is raging over who should attend these schools—the kids who score highest on the entrance exam or the kids who improve diversity. Featuring interviews with kids, parents, and education leaders, If You Can Make It Here places young students at the center of a high-stakes cultural conflict over the future of equity and excellence in public education.

title: GUR: Code "Sikora"
overview: Maksym is a pilot of an Mi-8 military helicopter, call sign "Sikora". Raised by his military grandfather, Maksym has been used to acting on moral grounds rather than under stress since childhood. When a full-scale war breaks out, he does not immediately rush into battle. But after the atrocities committed by the Russian military in Bucha, Irpin, and Donetsk region, he can no longer remain silent. The viewer is presented with a story not only of war, but also of the inner transformation of a man who is faced with the choice every day to stay on the sidelines or to become one of those who resist.

title: Robbin' the Hood
overview: Two brothers are roped into a scheme to rob from the rich and give to the poor, only to find their victims are not who they think they are.

title: Fiction's Hands
overview: In a tall, abandoned, and oppressive house, Luz pursues Mira, her childhood friend who takes refuge in the darkness, terrified of being seen. Amidst labyrinths of books and interwoven memories, their reunion clashes with reality. Argentine psychological and surreal horror about destructive love and the cost of vulnerability in fiction.

title: Land of Wonders
overview: Young artist Philip unexpectedly finds himself in a true Land of Wonders—a secret, magical world hidden in the vast expanses of Siberia. A thrilling adventure awaits him, meeting the fantastical Imor people and their amazing animals. But due to human intervention, the Land of Wonders and its inhabitants are in danger of destruction. Philip must save this magical world and his new friends at any cost.

title: Red Egg of the Crimson King
overview: In a dilapidated apartment drowned in the oppressive hum of electricity, a man kills his evenings by watching, through a hole in the wall, an empty stage bathed in childish music. This strange routine brings him a fragile joy.  But one evening, something appears: an egg-shaped object marked with a face. An enigmatic presence. An angel… God?

title: Rostam
overview: A night in ancient Persia, full of demons, vampires, jinn, and heroes, after the world has been plunged into darkness. The creatures of the night feed on the living and bask in the victory, but something is coming for them, and he will not stop.

title: The Black Ball
overview: The Black Ball, inspired by an unfinished play by Federico García Lorca, will be a queer vindication about three men in three different moments of Spanish history: 1932, 1937, and 2017.

title: Drishyam 3
overview: Third and final chapter of the Drishyam series.

title: Bonkey: The Mutated
overview: An alien disease spreads like wildfire infecting a chain of unsuspecting victims. A man and his dog are all that stand in the way of containing the danger.

title: Shabara
overview: An adventure written in the stars and across time.

title: Secrets of the Southwest: Science Behind the Secrets
overview: Meet the inspiring individuals and communities who work to protect our most beloved UK wildlife.

title: Untitled Cat Commercial
overview: A commercial for cat treats that cause lasers to shoot from the feline’s eyes to stop home invaders.

title: The Fall of Barsisa
overview: A modern re-imagining of the fable of the same name. Three brothers leave their ailing sister in the company of a devout and honourable figure as they are guided by an ambiguous stranger through treacherous terrain in search of a remedy.

title: Deadsight
overview: A cold-blooded contract killer known only as Deadsight executes without hesitation in order to clear his criminal record.

title: Secrets of the Southwest
overview: Discover the hidden stories Britain's southwest has to offer. From Foxes fighting on the streets of Bristol to Puffins looking for love on Skomer Island.

title: FILOFOBIA
overview: Claudio, a boy whose days unfold passively and repetitively in a cold and apathetic world, is in a long-distance relationship with Alessia, the only person he seems to be able to connect with. A harmless interaction with Maria, a girl he meets by chance, will trigger a panic attack and bring to light an uncomfortable truth he's been hiding.

title: The weight of water
overview: A guy, who just woke up, has to face the tough reality of water weight.

title: When Anyone Sees
overview: Christian, a young man overlooked by society, burdened by a dark past and escalating madness, finds himself trapped in a world of violence and despair.

title: Ducobu et le fantôme de Saint-Potache
Le Fantôme de l'Opéra
overview: Anastasia, an 18-year-old ballet dancer at the Opéra Garnier, becomes the obsession of a disfigured man living in the opera's underground labyrinth.

title: The Legend of Aang: The Last Airbender
overview: Avatar Aang, the world’s last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

title: The Social Reckoning
overview: Frances Haugen, a young Facebook engineer, enlists the help of Jeff Horwitz, a Wall Street Journal reporter, to go on a dangerous journey that ends up blowing the whistle on the social network's most guarded secrets.

title: Race to Monte Carlo
overview: This is the story of the visionaries behind Russia's first mass-produced automobile. In 1908, automotive enthusiast Andrey Nagel and engineer Dmitry Bondarev gather a team of like-minded individuals and begin developing a car. When the viability of their endeavor looks uncertain, Andrey Nagel makes the risky decision to enter their car in the Monaco Rally - a move that could make or break the budding automobile manufacturer's future.

title: First Witch
overview: A couple journey to a small town to visit a traditional healer for alternative conception methods, when they soon discover the dark secrets of the town's past.

title: Black Tides
overview: Rebecca reunites with her estranged father, Bill, in sunny Málaga expecting a healing family trip with her young son, Sebastian. Instead, their voyage across the Strait of Gibraltar becomes a nightmare as they’re relentlessly attacked by rogue orcas. Rebecca, confronting deep emotional wounds, must rise as an unlikely hero in a battle for survival.

title: The EGGsplosive Easter 2.0. Quantum Paradox
overview: After the events of the first part, where Ivan Zabiyaka built a ballistic missile, he takes on a new invention: a Time Machine, disguised as an old minibus.

title: Alte Liebe
overview: The everyday life of a married couple at a turning point: Lore wants a divorce—after almost 40 years of marriage.

title: Meeting the Buddha
overview: Meeting the Buddha presents the life and legacy of the 16th Karmapa, Rangjung Rigpe Dorje—the head of the Karma Kagyu lineage, one of four main schools of Tibetan Buddhism. The film captures the remarkable presence of this spiritual teacher, known as a Living Buddha and the King of the Yogis.  We meet Ole Nydahl, a wild young hippy from Denmark who, as a small child, had declared his wish to become the "Danish champion of mind." His life is radically transformed by a chance encounter with the Karmapa in Nepal in 1969.  Ole and his wife, Hannah, become key figures in bringing Tibetan Buddhism to the West, founding hundreds of meditation centres—from Mexico City to Vladivostok—and carrying forward their teacher's vision with unshakable dedication.

title: Ducks
overview: A young Frenchman of Cambodian origins goes to his country in search of himself.

title: Matchbox
overview: When a group of former childhood friends reconnect, their reunion takes a wild turn as they stumble upon a dangerous international plot—and must save the world.

title: Once in the Archipelago
overview: Three fathers join their daughters on a school trip to a quiet island. Stranded with a chaotic group of teenagers, they’re forced to confront past traumas as the line between play and power games slowly dissolves.

title: To You in the Beyond
overview: Kazuki Tsukigase is a high school boy who carries a certain secret. In search of a place where no one knows him, he enrolls at Sakijima High School on a remote island.  On Sakijima, there is a place known as the "Cove of Spiriting Away." One early summer day, Kazuki finds a girl lying unconscious in the cove. The girl—Nanao, 16 years old—later regains consciousness in the hospital, but her identity remains unknown. What is the meaning behind the word "1974" that she murmured?

title: Girls und Panzer das Finale: Part 5
overview: The fifth film in the six-part Girls und Panzer: Saishuushou film series.

title: Waves Turn
overview: Women reflect on their first year of motherhood and the many joys and challenges it brings – for parent and baby. A gentle, curious and informative conversational documentary about postpartum life, of sublime analogue beauty.

title: Eh Din Roz Ni Aune
overview: Introducing Avkaash Mann

title: Analog Eyes
overview: A loner dork gets fed up with the monotony of his existence under the shadow of his narcissistic friend. Forcing the the pair to reevaluate their place in life.

title: My Body is a Prison
overview: Conner brings his pillow to life

title: Mike
overview: A young man spirals through buried trauma and impulsive choices, igniting a thrilling descent into loss, desperation, and survival.

title: Currents
overview: 4 strangers follow completely different paths through the same day. Leading them all to meeting at a beach party filled with chaos, drama, and action.

title: Dolioo
overview: Sarah Jamson, daughter of Hudson’s murdered ally, wages a one-woman war against Hudson, using stealth, strategy, and vengeance-marked corpses to haunt him psychologically. Chloe Varenne, a symbol of lost love and innocence, becomes the spark that pushes KAEL toward rebellion.

title: Friday's Chylde 3D
overview: Friday's Chylde 3D

title: Ivanna 2
overview: Five years after surviving a massacre at a nursing home, Ambar, Dika, and Rina face Ivanna’s terror once again in a hospital. When a nurse is found beheaded, they realize Ivanna has returned and must be stopped before more victims fall.

title: Minotaur
overview: The director of a Russian company is preparing to fire his employees. At the same time, he discovers that his wife is cheating on him.

title: Maleepnedos
overview: An epic journey of uncanny proportion in which two friends must adapt and survive the peculiarities of this strange new world.

title: Iron Boy
overview: In rural France, Christophe (10) tries to live up to his rigid and distant father on the family farm. But the young boy starts to lean over and collapse without warning — on the tractor, at school, at dinner... A doctor finds the solution: Christophe must wear an iron corset to keep himself upright. Forced to reinvent his life away from the farm, Christophe discovers a new passion for music, meets a new friend, and follows her into his first mischief. But will any of this really fix what is out of balance?

title: Street Fighter
overview: In 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu and Ken Masters are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don't, it's GAME OVER!

title: Whalefall
overview: A scuba diver in search of his deceased father's remains gets swallowed by an 80-foot, 60-ton sperm whale and has only one hour to escape before his oxygen runs out. After giving up on life, the young man is surprised to find a reason to live in the most dangerous and unlikely of places.

title: Turnbuckle
overview: A small-town errand runner for a local drug producer faces one insurmountable task after another over 24 hours.

title: Heimsuchung
overview: A plot of land, a house by the lake, its changing inhabitants. This one plot of land reflects 70 years of German history from Weimar, the Nazis, the war, the Soviet occupation and reconstruction to the fall of the GDR.

title: Приключения пингвиненка
overview: The penguin Kwi is transferred from the Moscow Zoo to another city. However, during the transportation, an accident occurs, and the baby ends up alone in a big city. Thus begins his incredible journey home.

title: Don't Kill Loretta
overview: Deep in the forests of Germany, a group of young Americans activate the 600-year-old curse of Loretta. To survive, they must uncover her dark secret – before they all fall victim to her curse.

title: Lights, Camera, Action!
overview: An upcoming short film about a crew of inexperienced student filmmakers who accidentally kill one of their actresses on set.

title: Дьол сэттэ күнэ
overview: The film tells the story of 27-year-old Prokopiy, a man with autism who lives in isolation under his mother's strict supervision. His closed world changes with the arrival of Aiyyna, a girl who opens the outside world to him. Their fragile relationship becomes a test for all the characters. Prokopiy decides to leave his familiar cage and live his "seven days of happiness," discovering the world and himself.

title: The Book of Dreams
overview: After his wife’s death, Bolot raises his daughter Kyial, who once defeated cancer. But the illness returns, and there is almost no time left. When he learns about her secret diary of wishes, Bolot decides to take Kyial out of the hospital and fulfill every one of her dreams. Joining them on this journey is Kyial’s best friend, Joki — a grown man on the autism spectrum, who in his own way helps them endure the pain and rediscover the value of every single day.

title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend
overview: Faced with the truth about Miori and Touko Kirishima, Sakuta must make a choice. This will be his final case of Adolescence Syndrome!

title: La maleta
overview: Laura and Nacho meet on a flight, but their brief encounter ends when they pick up their bags. Laura proposes a game, revealing the suitcase belongs to terrorists.

title: The Eken 4
overview: Eken Babu’s next adventure, releasing on 16 October 2026.

title: The Time That Never Came
overview: In a world obsessed with youth, Sara chose to age naturally while Oskar, her partner, took an anti-aging treatment. Years later, when they reunite — divided by time but bound by the past — Sara begins a journey to reclaim lost love, confront buried emotions and find freedom.

title: R.L. Stine's Pumpkinhead 2
overview: A bullied teen finds a forbidden spellbook that revives an ancient curse for the little town of Redhaven. The pumpkin-headed children of previous sacrifices emerge from the Earth in hopes of claiming the town during the annual Harvest Festival. Perhaps the only hope for Redhaven is the return of a witch dead set on destroying the book.

title: Slash
overview: A group of friends are terrorized by a masked killer on Halloween.

title: The Observer
overview: A UFO mystery/thriller inspired by The Twilight Zone. Plot TBA.

title: Carlo Acutis: The Millennial Saint
overview: A high-profile documentary about 15-year-old Carlo Acutis, who, in 2025, become the Roman Catholic Church’s first millennial saint.

title: Superfly
overview: Coming Soon

title: Anemoia
overview: Marcos has been living most of his life on autopilot, as a spectator, daydreaming of something better than his current situation, until the father who abandoned him as a child knocks on his door.

title: Women as Lovers
overview: Although hostess Brigitte and life-loving schoolgirl Paula only meet in person once, their fates and lives are closely intertwined.

title: Georgia
overview: Famous Vegas director Steven Leroy receives a video link of the Kartvelian sword fighting dance from his daughter Mirrey. It impresses him so much that decides to travel to Sakartvelo in order to create an unforgettable show.

title: Karma
overview: In a village in northern Spain, Jeanne tries to rebuild her life with Daniel, who knows nothing about her troubled past. One day, Jeanne's six-year-old godson mysteriously disappears and Jeanne becomes the main suspect.

title: Lapland War
overview: Young soldier Heikki fights on the Karelian Isthmus alongside his friend Pauli. Arvo, recently released from prison, joins the company, challenging the others' views on war and duty with his worldview. The ceasefire raises hopes of returning home, but it soon becomes clear that Finland must turn against its former German allies in Lapland. At the same time, Saara, who works as a German interpreter in Rovaniemi, must choose her future: stay in Finland or flee to Germany with her beloved, Major Duisberg.

title: Let Love In
overview: After an affair comes to light, a couple's world unravels. Through confronting painful truths, they discover their crisis becomes a path to deeper connection and a new understanding of love.

title: Love Is a Gypsy Child: A Carmen Story
overview: Andalusia, Spain, 1840. After three years of wandering, Salva, who works as an assistant to a blind knife sharpener, returns to Seville, his hometown, where he meets Carmen, a gypsy woman with a captivating voice.

title: Clayface
overview: A Hollywood horror tale centering on a B-movie actor who injects himself with a substance to keep himself relevant, only to find out that he can reshape his face and form, becoming a walking piece of clay.

title: Der perfekte Urlaub
overview: The group of friends from “Das perfekte Geheimnis” have to ask themselves the question on a chaotic short trip to the south: Is there life after the truth or is their friendship over?

title: Morozko
overview: Sisters Marfa and Nastya are best friends, and they cope not only with a grumpy mother, but also with ancient magic, because of which winter has not come in their village for many decades. The girls manage to overcome all obstacles, drive away the evil witch, melt Morozko's heart, and also find love.

title: Chudo-Yudo
overview: With fairy-tale inhabitants, everything is the same as with people - when a marriage breaks up, Resentment remains... That is the name of the daughter of the powerful magicians Bolotnitsa and Chernogor, who divorced but continue to share power over the child. On the day of Resentment's coming of age, it turns out that she is deprived of the magical power that was supposed to be inherited from her parents. To fix the situation, Resentment urgently needs to find a groom in the human world, have a wedding and sacrifice the person - turn him into a tree... Together with Resentment, her mysterious friend, Chudo Yudo, goes to the human world. He can transform into anyone: a bird, an animal, and even a handsome prince.

title: A Dog's Show
overview: A disillusioned sheep dog triallist must come out of retirement and team up with his granddaughter to confront and defeat his nemesis - a mischievous sheep called Dolores - and overcome his neighbour, in order to save his family farm.

title: Kingdom of Crooked Mirrors
overview: Olya lives with her grandmother, who loves to tell her magical stories. Her parents are always busy and are rarely at home. The girl quarrels with her family and accidentally ends up in the mirror kingdom from her grandmother's stories, where she meets her reflection - Yalo. In this world, all people are too absorbed in mirrors, because in them they see ideal versions of themselves. These magic mirrors were invented by Korshun to subjugate the entire kingdom to his power, and Olya will have to believe in a miracle and save the fairy-tale world.

title: Nakee 3: The Cursed War
overview: Amid the war between Garuda and Naga, a curse that has bound the two races to endless conflict, a forbidden love emerges in the midst of the flames. One worships Garuda, the other reveres Naga. They must choose between their duty to their kind or joining forces to end a war that threatens to consume everything.

title: Flamin­go Flamenco
overview: The Fuente de Piedra lagoon in Spain is home to one of the largest flocks of flamingos in Europe. Once a year, the adolescent birds perform a dance that looks like... flamenco! But when the flock is attacked by hateful podencos (wild dogs) our heroine Rosie, a fun, dance crazy flamingo, loses her beloved sister and the flamenco is cancelled henceforth. She grows up a shadow of her former self, robbed of her sisters love and the joy of dance. One day she meets Carlos, an exuberant lizard, who encourages her to dance once more - rekindling her inner flame. Over time, she transforms back into her old confident self, before leading her flock to face down the podencos and dance once more.

title: SYNTHETICA
overview: Ada, a retired hacker living quietly as an art curator, discovers an illegal neural implant in their head after experiencing dangerous memory glitches. When an underground surgeon can't safely remove it, Ada is forced to accept one last job: infiltrate the corporation that created the device. As the mission unfolds, Ada must confront the truth about their forgotten past and the real purpose of the technology buried in their mind.

title: Monster Mia
overview: Out of place in the clipped town of Primrose and even her own family, wild child Mia and her scruffy pet rat Quentin are sent to the mysterious Rotwood Academy after one too many problems. The new school gives her the creeps, and Mia needs to figure a way out before her new classmates realize she isn’t a monster like them! But vice principal Van Vlad hosts a particular dislike for humans, and Mia is scared he's seen through her act...

title: In the Clear Moonlit Dusk
overview: The school’s cool, prince-like heroine has never questioned her role—until a fellow “Prince” enters her life and sees her as more than a hero, awakening feelings she’s never faced before.

title: Wildwood
overview: A girl’s desperate quest to save her baby brother unfolds into a spectacular, high-stakes adventure through a forbidden forest full of enchanted creatures, endearing allies, and formidable adversaries—where an entire hidden realm hangs in the balance.

title: Wife & Dog
overview: A "return to the colourful, back-stabbing world of the British aristocracy", this pic follows the relentless greed of the Fairbank family and their associates who fuel betrayal and murder in the battle for succession.

title: Made in Abyss: Mezameru Shinpi
overview: Sequel to Made in Abyss: The Golden City of the Scorching Sun.

title: La Venganza del Charro Negro
overview: The return of Leo San Juan and all the legends.

title: Neural Command
overview: In a cold future, where society is controlled by technology. Ethan, has a flash of his life before and starts to question what it means to truly live.

title: Faust
overview: After making a deal with the devil, an isolated and unsatisfied professor uses supernatural means to achieve success and happiness at the cost of his soul.

title: A Fair Trade
overview: In this black comedy crime epic, eighth grader Tommy Uris is pushed into a teenage drug dealing business run by his two classmates Frank Newton and Patrick Reynolds after walking in on a drug deal between them. As their business falls apart, so does their trust for each other, and they need to either resolve, or kill each other in the process.

title: Ghosts: The Possession of Button House
overview: It's a matter of life and death for Alison, Mike, Mia and the Ghosts.

title: Convince Me
overview: When a heartbroken man is forced to convince the Devil to grant his wish, he must face the truth about himself or risk paying an eternal price.

title: Nocturne in White
overview: An office worker drifts through a nameless government building that runs experiments on humans. As repetition begins to distort her reality, she becomes overwhelmed by the guilt and the sneaking suspicion that she may also be a subject of experimentation.

title: How They Really Are
overview: A boy named Tyler Ortin is struggling with lonlieness and the problem of his parents constant fighting when he becomes friends with a classmate Louey. Tyler helps his class get their grades back on track but the stress catches up to him.

title: Moulin
overview: The story of Jean Moulin, a French civil servant and resistant who succeeded in unifying the main networks of the French Resistance in World War II, and who served as the first President of the National Council of the Resistance during the German occupation of France.

title: Paper Cuts
overview: A deeper look into Switzerland's counterfeits during WWII.

title: The Pinecrest Lost Tapes: Chaos! Blood! & Violence (Prologue Short Film)
overview: Since the early 90s, Pinecrest, Massachusetts has suffered unexplained horrors. Nolan vanished without a trace in a winter storm. 23 years later, seven friends in a park discover the Rabbit has returned to Pinecrest.

title: Rise of the Empire
overview: Upon returning home from his Grand Embassy, Peter the Great enters into a prolonged war with Sweden to secure access to the Baltic Sea. His path to victory is paved with setbacks, treachery, and deceit. Only by overcoming these challenges will he become Emperor, find true love, and establish Russia as a great empire.

title: Other Mommy
overview: A young girl as her family, and their home, are haunted by a sinister entity that is determined to take up residence inside her. But first, it needs to persuade her to let it in…

title: The Blood Countess
overview: The Blood Countess and her maid embark on a quest for the red elixir of life and a book that threatens the vampire realm. Hot on their heels are a police inspector, two vampirologists, a vegetarian nephew and his therapist.

title: Spider Island
overview: A group of social media influencers go to the launch of a new hotel on a tropical island, where they find deadly spiders.

title: The Shepherd
overview: Set in the desolate Nevada night, a young woman in labor flees an abusive past who has her escape hijacked by a mysterious stranger hiding an ominous threat in the back of her car.

title: 100 Days
overview: "100 Days" is a feature film about Brazilian explorer Amyr Klink, who crossed the South Atlantic Ocean in 1984. It blends adventure, family drama, and emotional flashbacks from his childhood and teen years.

title: Giro poder o filme 4 o medalhão do poder o filme
Biermann
overview: Portrait of the German-German singer-songwriter and intellectual Wolf Biermann, whose famous Cologne concert in 1976 made German history.

title: Dead Howling
overview: A werewolf hunts zombies after losing his family. He meets two humans seeking sanctuary and joins their quest, protecting them with his powers. Their journey grows perilous as zombies start evolving.

title: RYUJI ⻯⼆
overview: The eternal legend etched into Japanese film history, rises again. (remake of the 1983 eponymous film).

title: The Salesman
overview: After the death of his wife, a man is greeted by an enthusiastic salesman.

title: Proposal
overview: When a brother tries to stop his sister from proposing to her girlfriend, the siblings peel back the layers of their relationship in real time.

title: Hangman
overview: Trapped amid a school lockdown, a troubled man seeks to better himself after reconnecting with an old crush but slowly becomes more unhinged as his true nature is revealed—threatening everyone around.

title: REEL
overview: After a late-night slasher screening, a group of horror-loving friends find themselves trapped in a terrifying game where slasher movie rules become reality. As eerie events unfold, they realize someone is rewriting the genre—forcing them to fight for survival in a film that’s still being written. The only way out? Break the rules before it’s too late.

title: Wendehorn
overview: Tara enters forbidden territory trying to find the wendehorn

title: Nightblade
overview: The Nightblade Killer is on the loose during the night of a full moon.

title: Lights! Camera!! Scream!!!
overview: A group of friends travel to Maine to make a low-budget horror film, only to discover the behind-the-scenes chaos is far more terrifying.

title: Bullet and Lace
overview: Bullet and Lace, a neon-soaked, Giallo-inspired nightmare, follows a young woman whose favorite true crime podcast becomes the voice of the masked intruder stalking her through the night.

title: + Add Friend
overview: A working man must confront his secret shame as his online activity unravels into his personal life- following an intimate encounter with an anonymous internet user.

title: Forget-me-not
overview: Dean Carter's mind unravels while deciphering the mystery behind the disappearance of his fiancé.

title: Girl Hell
overview: Upcoming Found Footage Short Film from Lucille Hanson. Plot TBA

title: Scream: Short Film
overview: After a brutal murder reawakens Woodsboro's dark past, Cora Clemenzo is pulled into a new Ghostface killing spree as her friends in the Woodsboro High Cinema Club become suspects and survival means uncovering the truth before history repeats itself...

title: Black Hollow
overview: Set in the rural Midwest during the 1970s, Black Hollow follows Jessica, an innocent young girl sheltered by small-town faith and her worldly friend Helen, whose rebellious streak leads them both into danger. When the two sneak out one foggy night, they wander to a forgotten churchyard, an isolated place where sacred ground conceals something unholy. As darkness descends, Jessica's search for belonging turns to horror, forcing her to confront the evil that thrives beneath the surface of the American heartland.

title: Watergate
overview: A sequel to Rupert v Nixon and the end for the RNCU

title: Power-Man
overview: Power-Man, the masked vigilante of Vancouver, meets a new enemy when he seizes control of television and uses it to brainwash the people of the city to become his minions.

title: Knock, Knock, Knock
overview: Three years after the Jamestown NightStalker murders in 2024 that killed both his brothers, Collin Woods lives in a state of confusion and paranoia. Seeing a psychiatrist and living with his best friend, his symptoms worsen when a reoccurring dream predicts the return of The NightStalker. As people around Collin begin to be killed, he is forced to confront his fate, or watch as The NightStalker takes the couple things he still has left.
